description_long: This is a tall, slender coatrack constructed primarily from metal tubing, featuring a collapsible tripod base for stability. The upper section consists of several outwardly angled arms designed to hold coats, hats, or bags, with each arm ending in a slightly upturned tip to prevent items from slipping off. The central shaft is adjustable in height, with visible locking mechanisms at the joints. The overall design is minimalist and utilitarian, with no decorative embellishments or color accents. The finish is matte black, giving it a modern, unobtrusive appearance suitable for urban environments. There is no umbrella holder or additional storage at the base.
description: A tall, black metal coatrack with a tripod base and multiple angled arms for hanging items. Its minimalist, utilitarian design is suited for urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the coatrack's arms and the tripod base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile and the angled arms extending forward and backward.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the symmetrical arrangement of the arms and base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the structure of the arms.
